reportSummary: The walkthrough was immediately blocked by a Cloudflare “Just a moment…” interstitial after clicking a visible Trending link, and waiting did not resolve it. With no controls to proceed, no content was reachable, so clarity, navigation, and conversion could not be evaluated. Console logs show a Private Access Token challenge with 401/403 responses, corroborating the block. This is a run limitation caused by the security layer, not proof the underlying site is slow or broken, but it’s still a dead end for a first‑time visitor.
